title: The real reasons behind most modern symptoms

chunks.title: Introduction and Podcast Overview
chunks.summary: The host introduces the podcast episode and the guest, Gary Brea, sharing excitement about various topics to be discussed including health, nutrition, and personal health journeys.
chunks.transcript: my message to the world is you're not as sick as you think you are you're just deficient on this week's podcast I had the distinct pleasure of hanging out with my good buddy my new friend Gary Brea in Los Angeles we got to talk about all kinds of cool stuff we talk about fluoride is it actually a problem should you be filtering your drinking water we talk about methylation MTHFR something that Gary has done an amazing job of bringing to the forfront again uh a lot of people have done a good job of talking about methylation in the past but Gary has Peak people's interest in this yet again and so a lot of people are benefiting from thinking about their genetics we talk about his health Journey we talk about his experience being a life insurance adjuster and what he learned looking at thousands and thousands of death claims and mortality data which have informed the way that he thinks about things with his health company which is called 10x health so enjoy this podcast with my friend Gary Brea it was a really fun one to do for me and I think you guys will get a lot out of this that will probably change the way you live on a daily basis and will help you feel better and be healthier so enjoy the podcast guys Gary Brea Paul salino thanks for coming on

chunks.title: Discussion on Fluoride
chunks.summary: The conversation shifts to the topic of fluoride in drinking water, with discussions about its origins, potential health impacts, and the debate over its necessity for dental health. They highlight the discrepancies in regulation and safety warnings surrounding fluoride exposure.

chunks.title: Water Filtration and Health
chunks.summary: The speakers discuss water filtration systems, emphasizing the need to filter out harmful substances, including fluoride and chlorine. They share personal anecdotes about filtration choices and their importance in maintaining health.

chunks.title: MTHFR Gene and Nutritional Deficiencies
chunks.summary: The hosts dive into the MTHFR gene mutation, its implications on health, and the importance of having the right nutrients like methylated folate to overcome deficiencies. They discuss genetic testing as a valuable tool for understanding health issues.

chunks.title: Cumulative Toxicity and Diet
chunks.summary: The episode discusses the concept of cumulative toxicity from environmental factors and modern diets, emphasizing the role of nutrient deficiencies in various health issues. They advocate for more awareness and informed choices in nutrition.

chunks.title: Practical Tips for Healthy Living
chunks.summary: The conversation wraps up with practical advice for improving health through dietary changes, such as focusing on whole foods and ancestral diets, while also addressing the societal factors that contribute to poor health outcomes.
chunks.transcript: no no one got sick we they just they're saying that we're not properly licensed we can't sell raw milk and raw dairy and raw cheese and so they came in and destroyed it all and I was like well damn now I gotta go find another another another another the same thing happens here with a farm in Fresno called raw farm so it's a raw Farm it's they make raw milk and raw cheese and raw cfir and raw cream it's the biggest raw dairy farm in the world according to theyve like a thousand it's in Fresno so it's in center of California yeah I went up there and visited them and a couple of funny stories about them so uh they actually there was like there was a shutdown on their cheese there was a recall recently here it seems they seem to be targeted and all of their stuff is tested and there's no Sal Manilla anywhere but they just get targeted by these things and they get taken off the shelves and they get shut down in California you can't sell the stuff and they they do all the research and they're like this is this is completely corrupt they're clearly just after us there was no contamination of any of our things it was another manufacturer but we get pulled off the shelves yeah they told me that the I don't know if it's the FDA or maybe it might be the DEA has shown up at their farm with like AR15s
